rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JOSEPH ALBERT MUSSO
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 10/27/2025. Issues necessitating a continuance: 1) If the surviving spouse elects to probate assets that are distributable directly to him/her, pursuant to Probate Code Section 13502, the written statement must clearly state that he/she has been fully informed about the reasons for a probate (rather than, e.g., a Spousal Property Petition) and the consequences thereof, including potential delay and increased fees (San Francisco Local Rule 14.35.I.5). 2) The election shall made within four months after the issuance of letters, or within any further time that the court may allow upon showing of good cause (Probate Code Section 13502(b)). Please address the above issues and provide courtesy copies of all further filings to this examiner no later than October 13, 2025, to avoid further continuance.

rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF JUANITA WALKER
rulings.Calendar Matter: REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (21 Hollywood Ct., San Francisco, Ca. 94112)
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The following issue to be cleared/addressed: The conservatee's current bond is set at $538,000. Attachment 6 states that an additional bond is unnecessary because the property is secured by substantial reverse mortgage and the estimated net proceeds from the sale amount to $200,000. It appears an additional bond is necessary as the cash assets are coming into the conservatorship, however. The Court will likely inquire about the additional bond amount, including proper recovery funds. First account petition is not due until 6/15/2026. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF YENNIFER ANAHI CAN VILLANUEVA
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Compliance Status Hearing
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 10/27/2025. The following issues must be cleared two weeks before. 1. Page 3 Proof of Mailing of GC-341. The following items must be completed. (1) #3 - a or b must be affirmed. The filed form affirms neither (2) # 5 - Date of the order must be listed at the end of the sentence. (3) The form was signed but not dated. 2. The notice was sent to the conservatee only; however. It should be sent to the court-appointed attorney (Ms. Callejo) for the conservatee and the conservatee's relatives within the second degree (father and grandparents have not been informed). If the conservators need assistance to clear the issues, please contact the ACCESS center. (415) 551-0605 or https://sf.courts.ca.gov/access-legal-self-help-center.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE ENEZ ANITA BESSARD TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Beneficiaries Petition For An Order Directing Successor Trustee, Gwendolyn Sacco To Purchase Each Beneficiary'S Interest Or To Sell Trust Realty
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/19/25. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) There is no exhibit attached to the supplement that was just e-filed on 9/17/25. (2) An "Estate" is not a proper party. Has someone been appointed for the estate of Luzell Sander? (3) If Jasmine Bessard is the sole heir of Raymond Bessard, has she executed a 13100 affidavit? (4) Has Gwendolyn Sacco directed in writing that notice be mailed to her attorney only? [CRC 7.51(a) and (b)]. Please provide courtesy copies of the petition and any papers filed to address these issues to the assigned examiner by 11/5/25. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF SUSAN NORA BEARD
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The court will decide whether the presumption under Prob. Code sec. 6124 has been rebutted. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF HELEN BOO YOCK WONG
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/3/25. Examiner's Notes sent to counsel on 9/15/25 with the following issues: 1.Item 3b states that decedent was a citizen of China; however, 3b was not checked. Please clarify. 2.A detailed declaration of due diligence must be filed regarding search for every child (including sources and dates searched). 3.Notice under PC 8113 has not been given.

rulings.Case Title: IN RE MARRIAGE OF JOSE SANTOS RAMIREZ
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. (1) The relief relating to the death certificate request is to be made to the Alameda County Court pursuant to H&S 103450(a). (2) The request made under this petition does not seem appropriate because there is a valid marriage certificate. Need an authority for the court to adjudicate that the two names are for one individual because this petition, which is brought under Health and Safety code 103450-103490, does not seem to support the request. (3) Proposed order VS-122 must be submitted. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.
